name: enkl/mariadb-api
description: Self-hosted PHP + standalone MariaDB API tier for Enkl — a third parity port of api/Enkl.Api (the .NET API) and php-api (the Postgres/PHP tier), runnable in parallel to either. Same HTTP contract, so the existing frontend (src/js/api.js) works unmodified against any of the three. See mariadb-api/CLAUDE.md for the handful of places this tier's SQL/architecture genuinely diverges from php-api's (MariaDB has no LISTEN/NOTIFY, no session-scoped advisory locks, etc.) rather than just being a dialect swap.
